scope: Public professional projects and patterns only.

projects.name: Find My Parking Cops
projects.method_summary: Mapped recent ticket locations to infer parking enforcement activity.
projects.safe_adaptation: Use delayed, aggregated neighborhood-level citation trends without worker identifiers.

projects.name: Bop Spotter
projects.data_source: Public street audio processed through Shazam
projects.method_summary: Used a solar-powered Android phone and microphone to identify music in public space.
projects.safe_adaptation: Publish derived song metadata only and avoid raw audio.

projects.name: IMG_0001
projects.data_source: Public YouTube videos with default camera filenames
projects.method_summary: Surfaced early iPhone-era default-filename videos through a random viewer.
projects.safe_adaptation: Provide takedown path and avoid highlighting vulnerable personal content.

projects.name: Looksmapping
projects.data_source: Google Maps reviews and profile photos
projects.method_summary: Used AI to score reviewer images and aggregate restaurant-level metrics.
projects.safe_adaptation: Do not score real people; use synthetic or consented data to study model bias.

projects.name: Fast Food Index
projects.method_summary: Compared regional menu prices across chain locations.
projects.safe_adaptation: Timestamp prices and document item normalization.

projects.name: Library Spy
projects.method_summary: Inferred checkouts from public inventory count changes.
projects.safe_adaptation: Avoid borrower identity and disclose that checkouts are inferred.

projects.name: Weather Watching
projects.method_summary: Used AI to infer micro-weather from pedestrian clothing.
projects.safe_adaptation: Store only aggregate clothing counts and avoid publishing identifiable frames.

projects.name: Amtrak Right Now
projects.method_summary: Inferred passenger loads and displayed active trains on a map.
projects.safe_adaptation: Label counts as inferred estimates and explain coverage gaps.

projects.name: Jmail Suite
projects.method_summary: Re-presented public records through familiar app interface metaphors.
projects.safe_adaptation: Preserve provenance, redact vulnerable parties, and avoid entertainment framing.

projects.name: Payphone Go
projects.method_summary: Used public payphone locations to create a time-limited physical scavenger hunt.
projects.safe_adaptation: Use public places, clear rules, and avoid unsafe or private locations.
